title: equisetum hyemale f. pumilum
intro: Equisetum hyemale f. pumilum, also known as dwarf horsetail, is a subspecies of the Equisetum hyemale plant, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale f. pumilum include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. Herbal preparations of Equisetum hyemale f. pumilum include tea, tincture, and ointment, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
